title: QUIC Interop Post-Handshake Stream Open/Accept Verification
verification_method: Focused requirement-home tests, build execution, and artifact inspection.
preconditions: REQ-QUIC-API-0002, REQ-QUIC-INT-0007, REQ-QUIC-INT-0008, and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0121 remain green.
The harness can dispatch `post-handshake-stream` through the managed child-process path.
Loopback UDP sockets are available in the test environment.
scope: Verify the managed child-process `post-handshake-stream` testcase, the handshake-completion gate, the client-side first-stream open, the server-side first-stream accept, and the honesty of unsupported transfer and retry cases.
procedure: Run the new post-handshake-stream requirement-home test and confirm the client opens the first application stream after connect completion while the server accepts it after accept completion.
Run the existing handshake/public guard tests and the CRT client 1-RTT readiness proof to keep the prerequisite floor green.
Render and validate the SpecTrace JSON and Markdown artifacts after any canonical JSON updates.
expected_result: The child-process harness proves the first application-stream open/accept pair after handshake completion while transfer and retry remain `127`.
status_summary: Planned; this verification slice records the proof contract for the smaller prerequisite beneath the transfer-owned slice.

supplemental_sections.heading: Deferred Coverage
supplemental_sections.content: Byte delivery, EOF, transfer enablement, retry enablement, multi-stream generalization, broader 1-RTT data-path ownership, trust-store policy widening, 0-RTT, and key update remain intentionally deferred.
